content.text: Claude is multimodal, meaning it can process images as input alongside text.
: You can upload an image and ask Claude to describe what it shows (e.g., “What’s in this picture?”).
: It can interpret diagrams, charts, screenshots, UI designs, code snippets in images, or handwritten notes.
: You can ask questions like “What’s wrong with this UI layout?” or “Explain this flowchart” and Claude will reason over the visual content.
: For images with text, it can often read and extract the text, then answer questions about it.
This is useful when you’re working with screenshots, diagrams, or any visual material that you want to understand or discuss.
